is the number of months during the year that the beneficiary had Medicare Part B 
coverage. (This is sometimes referred to as supplemental medical insurance coverage — or SMI 
coverage.) CCW derives this variable by counting the number of months where the beneficiary had 
Part B coverage (i.e., the MDCR_ENTLMT_BUYIN_IND_XX variable equaled 2, B, 3, or C).
